data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp employs a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Distributed services using Docker containers and Kubernetes for orchestration.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: All messages are end-to-end encrypted to ensure privacy and security.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes the Signal Protocol for encryption.

data.title: Cross-Platform Synchronization
data.description: Ensures consistent user experience across mobile and web platforms.
data.technical_spec: Uses client-server model with JSON and WebSockets for real-time updates.

data.title: Global Content Delivery Network
data.description: Improves accessibility and speed by using a global CDN.
data.technical_spec: AWS CloudFront and other regional CDNs to cache data close to users.

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.description: Enables WhatsApp to handle billions of messages daily with high reliability.
data.technical_spec: Kafka and Cassandra for messaging and storage.
